caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold across the chest, a gold chain, and a gold watch. He wears over-the-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him, a white backdrop features several repeating logos that read "UNION HUSTLE" beneath four gold stars. A blue banner in the background states, "Where BOSSES Talk!". To the man's right, a black mug sits on a wooden desk, featuring the text "TALK OUT". In the bottom left corner, a small logo reads "TALK OUT". Across the frames, the man is captured in mid-conversation, his facial expression shifting from a slight smile while looking toward someone off-camera to a more strained expression with his eyes squinted as he continues to speak.
